violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-coolers need cleaned of food debris.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-Freezers need cleaned of food debris.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory next to Ice maker needs to be cleaned of food debris in drain. Don't use sink for any other purpose other than handwashing.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent 0/2, C SANITIZATION 30 Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
